## Summary
What country, region, or Indigenous group is this request for?

## Why This Matters
Explain the need and expected impact.

## Suggested Scope
- General review prompt
- Workplace review prompt
- Regional README

## Source Foundations
List trusted public sources (community authorities, legislation, policy frameworks, research institutions).

## Cultural Safety Notes
Any important protocols, terminology preferences, or sensitivities contributors should know.

## Optional Draft Material
Add links, notes, or draft prompt text if available.
